title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: Drones attacked one of the largest logistics warehouses of Wildberries in Russia. Eyewitnesses heard 20-30 explosions, and the siren was turned on after the incident "for two minutes, and then turned off." It is also reported that employees of the logistics center were evacuated after a series of explosions. Reuters writes that many people throughout the Russian Federation will most likely feel any long-term disruption of Wildberries. Имея...
description_en: Drones attacked one of the largest logistics warehouses of Wildberries in Russia. Eyewitnesses heard 20-30 explosions, and the siren was turned on after the incident "for two minutes, and then turned off." It is also reported that employees of the logistics center were evacuated after a series of explosions. Reuters writes that many people throughout the Russian Federation will most likely feel any long-term disruption of Wildberries. Имея...
description_uk: Дроны атаковали один из крупнейших логистических складов Wildberries в России Очевидцы слышали 20–30 взрывов, а сирену включили уже после инцидента "на две минуты, а затем выключили". Также сообщается, что сотрудников логистического центра эвакуировали после серии взрывов. Reuters пишет, что любое длительное нарушение работы Wildberries, скорее всего, почувствуют многие люди по всей РФ. Имея...

title: Crimea: Power outage reported

title_uk: Крим: повідомляється про відключення електроенергії
description: Massive fires in southern Russia, blackouts in occupied Crimea amid reported Ukrainian strikes. Blackouts were reported throughout occupied Crimea, and massive fires broke out in several southern Russian cities amid Ukrainian strikes on retail logistics facilities overnight on July 22, according to monitoring channels.
description_en: Massive fires in southern Russia, blackouts in occupied Crimea amid reported Ukrainian strikes. Blackouts were reported throughout occupied Crimea, and massive fires broke out in several southern Russian cities amid Ukrainian strikes on retail logistics facilities overnight on July 22, according to monitoring channels.

description: Thanks to Ukraine's new strategy, Russia's grip on Crimea is crumbling “In its months-long campaign to strangle Russia’s hold on Crimea, starving the peninsula of fuel and forcing Russians to flee en masse, Ukraine has finally killed off the idea that Crimea is some kind of "special" or "holy" place for Russians,” writes Casey Michel, Director of the Combating Kleptocracy Program, in his op-ed....

title: Video of the use of balloons to deliver Ukrainian UAVs to a long...
title_en: Video of the use of balloons to deliver Ukrainian UAVs to a long...
title_uk: Відео використання повітряних куль для доставки українських БПЛА на далеку...
description: Video of the use of balloons to deliver Ukrainian UAVs to a long distance and launch them from the air. The occupiers complain that the balloons are carried by high-speed electric drones, they travel at an altitude of 5-7 thousand km until they enter the zone they need, after which they drop the kamikaze UAV.
description_en: Video of the use of balloons to deliver Ukrainian UAVs to a long distance and launch them from the air. The occupiers complain that the balloons are carried by high-speed electric drones, they travel at an altitude of 5-7 thousand km until they enter the zone they need, after which they drop the kamikaze UAV.
description_uk: Видео применения воздушных шаров для доставки украинских БПЛА на большую дистанцию и их запуска с воздуха. Оккупанты стонут, что воздушные шары несут скоростные электрические беспилотники, они идут на 5-7 тысячах км высоты до момент входа в нужную им зону, после чего сбрасывают БПЛА камикадзе.

title: Kyiv: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy...

description: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga held the first telephone conversation with the newly appointed Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs of Great Britain Ed Miliband. Andriy Sybiga congratulated him on his appointment and thanked Great Britain for its steadfast support of Ukraine since the first days of the full-scale invasion of Russia, in particular for military, energy, humanitarian, economic and sanctions...
description_en: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga held the first telephone conversation with the newly appointed Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs of Great Britain Ed Miliband. Andriy Sybiga congratulated him on his appointment and thanked Great Britain for its steadfast support of Ukraine since the first days of the full-scale invasion of Russia, in particular for military, energy, humanitarian, economic and sanctions...
description_uk: 🇬🇧 Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга провів першу телефонну розмову з новопризначеним державним секретарем у закордонних справах Великої Британії Едом Мілібендом. Андрій Сибіга привітав його з призначенням на посаду та подякував Великій Британії за непохитну підтримку України з перших днів повномасштабного вторгнення Росії, зокрема за військову, енергетичну, гуманітарну, економічну та санкційну...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: Almost half of the Russian "Lightning" drones were destroyed by the interceptors of the "General Chereshnia" company in June. In June 2026, the interceptor drones of the Ukrainian company "General Chereshnia" destroyed more than 13 thousand Russian "Lightning" drones, which is 43% of all the confirmed defeats of these drones in a month. It follows that almost every second destroyed "Lightning" drone was intercepted precisely...
description_en: Almost half of the Russian "Lightning" drones were destroyed by the interceptors of the "General Chereshnia" company in June. In June 2026, the interceptor drones of the Ukrainian company "General Chereshnia" destroyed more than 13 thousand Russian "Lightning" drones, which is 43% of all the confirmed defeats of these drones in a month. It follows that almost every second destroyed "Lightning" drone was intercepted precisely...
description_uk: Почти половину российских дронов "Молния" в июне уничтожили перехватчики компании "Генерал Черешня" Дроны-перехватчики украинской компании "Генерал Черешня" в июне 2026 года уничтожили более 13 тысяч российских беспилотников "Молния", что составляет 43% от всех подтвержденных поражений этих дронов за месяц. Из этого следует, что почти каждый второй уничтоженный дрон "Молния" был перехвачен именно...

The deliberate attack on the LPG tanker Gas Lisbon, which was headed to Ukraine and was attacked near the coast of Romania, is another example of Russian...

description_uk: 💬 Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга відреагував на удар Росії по судну Gas Lisbon неподалік Румунії: "Російська війна загрожує не лише України, але й становить пряму загрозу свободі судноплавства, морській безпеці в Чорному морі та східному флангу НАТО. Навмисний напад на LPG-танкер Gas Lisbon, який прямував до України й був атакований поблизу узбережжя Румунії, є черговим прикладом російського...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: In Ukraine, a new generation of "pisyuns" will soon appear that will be able to intercept jet Shaheds. According to Reuters, the SkyFall company presented a new version of the interceptor drone "P1-Sun" against jet Shaheds at the air show in Great Britain. The P1-SUN JetKiller has a speed of up to 370 km/h, has already passed combat tests and destroyed more than a dozen Shahed jets. According to Reuters,...
description_en: In Ukraine, a new generation of "pisyuns" will soon appear that will be able to intercept jet Shaheds. According to Reuters, the SkyFall company presented a new version of the interceptor drone "P1-Sun" against jet Shaheds at the air show in Great Britain. The P1-SUN JetKiller has a speed of up to 370 km/h, has already passed combat tests and destroyed more than a dozen Shahed jets. According to Reuters,...
description_uk: В Украине скоро появится новое поколение "писюнов", которые смогут перехватывать реактивные шахеды Как сообщает Reuters, компания SkyFall представила на авиасалоне в Великобритании новую версию дрона-перехватчика "P1-Sun" против реактивных "Шахедов". P1-SUN JetKiller развивает скорость до 370 км/ч, уже прошел боевые испытания и уничтожил более десятка реактивных Shahed. По данным Reuters,...
